questionHtml: Using an AD/AS diagram, explain how “increasing China’s interest rate” could affect its economic growth (paragraph [5]).
markschemeHtml:
Candidates who incorrectly label diagrams can be awarded a maximum of [3].

For AD/AS the vertical axis may be average (general) price level, APL or price level. For the horizontal axis, real output, real national output, real income, real national income, real GDP or real Y. Any abbreviations are acceptable. A title is not necessary.

meta.title: Using an AD/AS diagram, explain how “increasing China’s interest rate” could affect its economic growth (paragraph [5]).
